name: pawclaw
description: A privacy-minded, extensible desktop pet for OpenClaw.
author: Gui-Tora

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:scripts && npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/desktop
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/shared && npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/openclaw-client && npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/pet-engine && npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/pet-sdk && npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/persistence
scripts.check: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:workspaces && npm run test:unit && npm run validate:pets:files
scripts.prevalidate:pets: npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/shared && npm run build --workspace=@pawclaw/pet-sdk
